items.h: AEW Collision viewership up big despite UFC 329 & World Cup competition
items.p: Saturday night was alright for AEW Collision to be back on its normal night. This past Saturday’s live episode averaged 405,000 viewers on TNT, up 31.9% from the previous week’s Thursday airing,...

items.h: WWE's Big E Explains Why He Has Respect For AEW Star Lio Rush
items.p: Retired WWE star Big E has praised his former colleague and current AEW star Lio Rush for experimenting with his character and trying new things.

items.h: AEW Collision (7/11) Draws 409,000 Viewers In Return To Saturday

items.h: Injured AEW Star Buddy Matthews Teases Major Health Update
items.p: AEW star Buddy Matthews, who has been on the shelf with injury for over a year, teased a major health update on social media.

items.h: WWE's Mia Yim Confirms She And AEW Star Keith Lee Are Divorced
items.p: WWE star Mia Yim (also known as Michin) confirmed her divorce from AEW's Keith Lee in a series of social media comments.
